# Recommended GitHub Topics

Add these topics to your repository for better discoverability:

## Core Topics
- `llm`
- `memory`
- `knowledge-graph`
- `rag`
- `retrieval`
- `ai`
- `machine-learning`
- `python`

## Technology Topics
- `graph-database`
- `semantic-search`
- `vector-embeddings`
- `markdown`
- `cli`
- `api`

## Integration Topics
- `chatgpt`
- `openai`
- `claude`
- `anthropic`
- `ollama`
- `langchain`
- `llamaindex`

## Use Case Topics
- `note-taking`
- `personal-knowledge-management`
- `pkm`
- `second-brain`
- `zettelkasten`
- `obsidian`

## How to Add Topics

1. Go to your repository on GitHub
2. Click the ⚙️ (Settings icon) next to "About"
3. Add topics from the list above
4. Click "Save changes"

This will help users find your project when searching for related technologies!
